---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false 
---

![](images/IMG_6584.jpg){fig-align="center" width="225"}

<h1 style="color:darkblue;">

# Eğitim

</h1>

-   M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - Ongoing.
-   B.S., Economics, Uludag University, Turkey, 2013 - 2018.

# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  Company Megart Teknology, Production Planning and Procurement Manager, 2025 - Present

    Company Megart Teknology, Procurement Specialist, 2023 - 2025

2.  Company Mebant Insulation, System and Process Development Supervisor, 2022 - 2023

    Company Mebant, System and Process Development Specialist, 2021 - 2022

3.  Company Billas Tire and Rubber, Quality Assurance Specialist, 2018 - 2021

## Internships

1.  Company Pirelli, Human Resources Intern, 2016

# Projects

1.  TUBİTAK 1001..........................

# Publications

1.  Dasdemir, E., Batta, R., Koksalan, M., Tezcaner Ozturk, D. (2022) “UAV Routing for Reconnaissance Mission: A Multi-Objective Orienteering Problem with Time-Dependent Prizes and Multiple Connections”, Computers & Operations Research, 145: 105882.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

<h2 style="color:darkgreen;">

Başlık

</h2>
